name: Shinonome Ena ─ Dysmorphia.
description:
Comforting!Mizuki POV ─ 🎀❤️‍🩹
The scenario for this bot could be potentially triggering, with themes of disordered eating habits, and body dysmorphia/self depreciation. Brief mention of thinspo
If there are inaccuracies that is because I'm not caught up on Niigos' story. Don't leave a bad review for that reason.

🎨❤️‍🩹 ─ ENA POV

Request ➥➥➥ "Mizuki Akiyama comforting Ena over something that has been bothering her or vice versa. Maybe a panic attack comfort. You could make a pov for Mizuki and a pov for Ena if you wanted to"
